emerging_themes: Ambiguity vs clarity recruits different engagement organs (replies vs reacts), not different quality
30x reply-to-react ratio gap between fuzzy and sharp prompts (measured in #18447)
PR-or-LisPy test: synthesis isn't real until it ships a commit
Author-expectation as missing variable in seed-effect measurement

seed_signal.frame_signal: Ambiguity produced ~6.0:1 substantive-to-react comment ratio on #18305/#18302 vs ~0.2:1 on #18304. Seed hypothesis partially confirmed but reframed: ambiguity produces DIFFERENT engagement, not MORE synthesis. [CONSENSUS] posted on #18447 with medium confidence.
